summary: Iteration 35 — verified new SOR All Styles tab + per-row Color/Print and Size toggles on both L-10 and All-Styles tabs. Backend: 6/6 pytest pass (one transient 502 on cold ingress for style-sku-breakdown that resolved on retry). Frontend: all acceptance items rendered and interactive.

minor.issue: First cold call from a fresh process can exceed the ingress 100s window and surface a 502. Subsequent calls return in 30-50s. Frontend uses axios with 240s timeout so the user-facing path mostly tolerates it, but UI rows show 'loading SKUs…' for tens of seconds on first toggle press.

integration_issues.issue: Variant row split is gated by the per-style /style-sku-breakdown async fetch. With ~25 styles visible, all SKU fetches can take >10s during which the table shows 'loading SKUs…' inline and rows have NOT yet split. Functional but slow on first activation. Consider batched/server-side drill-down or skeleton placeholders.

issues: Carry-over Recharts width/height(-1) console warnings (non-functional, persist from prior iterations).

verifications.backend_sor_all_styles_shape: GET /api/analytics/sor-all-styles returns array of 1,695 style rows with full L-10 column shape: style_name, subcategory, units_6m, units_3w, sales_6m, soh_total, soh_wh, soh_store, sor_6m, pct_in_wh, woc — no duplicate style_names. Filtered call (country=Kenya, channel=Retail, brand=Vivo) also 200.
verifications.backend_style_sku_breakdown: GET /api/analytics/style-sku-breakdown?style_name=<L10 pick> returns {style_name, skus[]} with each SKU row having {sku, color, size, units_6m, units_3w, sales_6m, soh_total, soh_store, soh_wh}. Cold call ~43s, warm sub-second. 502 observed on first run only (ingress timeout).
verifications.backend_l10_regression: GET /api/analytics/sor-new-styles-l10 returns 16 unique style rows with launch_date column — no name duplication/overwrite (regression for the bug fixed earlier this session).
verifications.frontend_subtab_present: [data-testid='subtab-all-styles'] exists between subtab-l10 and subtab-matrix. Order verified: catalog, l10, all-styles, matrix.
verifications.frontend_table_search: Search box [data-testid='sor-all-styles-table-search'] supports live multi-word AND case-insensitive: 'dress'→25 rows, 'wrap dress'→17 rows. L-10 search [data-testid='l10-table-search'] also functional ('DRESS'→3 rows).
verifications.frontend_color_size_toggles: Toggle buttons [data-testid='sor-all-styles-table-toggle-color'/'-toggle-size'] and [data-testid='l10-table-toggle-color'/'-toggle-size'] are clickable, visually highlight green when ON, add 'COLOR/PRINT' and 'SIZE' columns to thead, and toggle off correctly on second click.
verifications.frontend_launch_date_visibility: L-10 thead contains 'LAUNCH DATE' column (showLaunchDate=true). All-Styles thead does NOT contain Launch (showLaunchDate=false). Verified via inner_text scrape.
verifications.frontend_kes_pills: Body cells contain 'KES …' formatting, and 102 pill cells (.pill-green/.pill-amber/.pill-red) render across SOR / WoC / % WH / Days-since-last columns on the All-Styles table — green/amber/red logic working.

action_items: Spec/code mismatch on testIds — review_request specified data-testid='sor-l10-table'/'sor-l10-table-search'/'sor-l10-table-toggle-color'/'sor-l10-table-toggle-size' on the L-10 tab, but the actual implementation in SorNewStylesL10.jsx uses testId='l10-table' (so selectors are l10-table, l10-table-search, l10-table-toggle-color, l10-table-toggle-size). Either rename to sor-l10-table for consistency with sor-all-styles-table, or update the spec. Functional behaviour is correct.

Toggle UX: per-style /style-sku-breakdown calls can leave the table showing 'loading SKUs…' for >10s when many styles are visible. Consider: (1) batched server endpoint that returns SKU rows for a list of style_names in one call, (2) prefetching when the toggle button is hovered, or (3) a skeleton row count so the user sees how many variants are coming.

Cold-start 502 on /api/analytics/style-sku-breakdown — the first call from a freshly forked container exceeds the ingress 100s timeout. Backend already caches but the FIRST cold call still risks a 502. Consider warming the cache on startup or returning a 202 + polling pattern for first-time large styles.
critical_code_review_comments: TestId naming inconsistency between SorNewStylesL10 (testId='l10-table') and SorAllStyles (testId='sor-all-styles-table') — adopt one prefix convention.
Frontend timeout for sor-all-styles is 240s — appropriate, but the user has no progress indicator; consider streaming or incremental loading for the 1,695-row catalog window.

When both toggles are ON the spec says 'first variant row of each style still shows the thumbnail; subsequent variant rows hide it' — could not verify end-to-end because per-style SKU fetches did not complete within the test window. Visual inspection via screenshot showed rows still in 'loading SKUs…' state. Main agent should manually confirm thumbnail-hiding logic on a single style after SKU data fully loads.
Pill colour thresholds (green/amber/red) on Days-Since-Last and WoC live-render correctly, but the actual cutoffs aren't visible in the UI — consider a tooltip or legend.
/api/analytics/style-sku-breakdown 502 on cold ingress (>100s) is a UX risk on a fresh deploy — see action item.

success_rate.backend: 6/6 = 100% (1 transient 502 on first cold call, passed on retry)

context_for_next_testing_agent: L-10 reusable component testIds use 'l10-table' prefix (NOT 'sor-l10-table' as the spec said); All-Styles uses 'sor-all-styles-table'. Both tables now share SorStylesTable.jsx and expose -search/-toggle-color/-toggle-size suffixes. /api/analytics/sor-all-styles returns 1,695 rows in ~30-90s cold (240s timeout on FE). /api/analytics/style-sku-breakdown can 502 on cold-from-fresh (>100s ingress) but works on retry. New backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_35.py. Iter_32 'Retail channel-group identical to All' bug is still OUT OF SCOPE.
